Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 653}I can't sleep with a pillow that isn't mine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 653}I was worried about not being able to sleep, but I slept like a log last night![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 653}This is one fine inn! Their cushions are world-class![n]{f 1 1}
